tackles_per_snap_z.limits: High rates can mean poor coverage forcing more tackles.

passer_rating_allowed_z.what: QB rating when targeting this safety. The classic coverage stat.
passer_rating_allowed_z.how: PFR season-level passer rating allowed, z-scored with sign inverted.
passer_rating_allowed_z.limits: Volume-dependent. Free safeties see more attempts than box safeties.

completion_pct_allowed_z.what: % of passes completed when this safety was targeted. Lower is better.
completion_pct_allowed_z.limits: Slot safeties face shorter, easier-to-complete throws.

yards_per_target_allowed_z.what: Yards allowed per target. Lower is better.
yards_per_target_allowed_z.limits: YAC partly out of the safety's control.

targets_per_game_z.what: How often opponents threw at this safety.
targets_per_game_z.limits: High volume can be 'most-targeted area' OR 'weak link picked on' — context matters.

avg_depth_of_target_z.what: Average depth of target on plays this safety was the nearest defender.
avg_depth_of_target_z.limits: Free safeties play deeper than strong / nickel safeties.

missed_tackle_pct_z.what: % of tackle attempts missed. Lower is better.
missed_tackle_pct_z.how: PFR missed_tackle_pct, z-score inverted so positive = reliable tackler.
missed_tackle_pct_z.limits: PFR scoring; not always identical to PFF's.
